recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Waiting for the Hearse
recommendations.overview: Mama Cora, who is almost eighty years old, has three sons and a daughter. She lives with one of them, who has serious financial problems. The family meets one day to celebrate an anniversary meal, and that is when the problem arises: which of them wi

recommendations.title: Dil Dhadakne Do
recommendations.overview: On a cruise to celebrate their parents' 30th wedding anniversary, a brother and sister deal with the impact of family considerations on their romantic lives.

recommendations.title: Greed
recommendations.overview: A retail billionaire's 60th birthday party is celebrated in an exclusive hotel on the Greek island of Mykonos.

recommendations.title: Honeymoon with My Mother
recommendations.overview: A young man is stood up at the altar. His overprotective mother decides to join him is what would have been his honeymoon, so as not to waste the trip. He ails while his mum enjoys the trip of her life.

recommendations.title: Happy Anniversary
recommendations.overview: A quirky couple spends their three-year dating anniversary looking back at their relationship and contemplating whether they should break up.

recommendations.title: Return to Halloweentown
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, Comedy, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: As Halloweentown prepares to celebrate its 1,000th anniversary, Marnie Piper and her brother Dylan return to Witch University, where trouble is in session from the Sinister Sisters and from someone who's plotting to use Marnie's powers for evil.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall
recommendations.overview: A disfigured musical genius, hidden away in the Paris Opera House, terrorises the opera company for the unwitting benefit of a young protégée whom he trains and loves. The 25th anniversary of the first public performance of Phantom of the Opera was c

recommendations.title: Holy Camp!
recommendations.overview: María and Susana, two rebellious teenagers, spend the summer in a catholic camp. While they are grounded during a weekend, the most unexpected arrival in the most unexpected way will change their feelings about life, love and freedom.

recommendations.title: A Million Miles Away
recommendations.overview: The life of engineer and former NASA astronaut José M. Hernández, the first migrant farmworker to go to space.
